meta.intent: Produce one instantly legible, high-stakes rescue beat with a hero puppy hanging over the flood and a clean route that reads in seconds even to a cold viewer.
meta.expectedPath: Reject the compact upper-left bait clear, take the authored lower B triple to trigger the hero rescue, then clear the compact upper-right A pair to free the secondary puppy and end cleanly.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player keeps spending actions in the bait pocket or generic clears, misses the obvious lower rescue beat, and loses the simple capture read to avoidable pressure.
meta.whatItProves: The game has a genuinely captureable rescue sequence that resolves through the real action pipeline rather than a scripted fake.
meta.notes: The capture board keeps the hero sightline and roofed rescue neighbors, while the upper-left D pair is an intentional first-read bait choice before the urgent lower B rescue.
